phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut accéder au toit sans billet ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn puh ahk-say-DAY oh TWAH sahn bee-YEH
phrases.cultural_note: The rooftop terrace and restaurant are accessible with a museum ticket. The view from the 6th floor is one of the best free panoramas in Paris — you can see the Eiffel Tower and Sacré-Cœur.

responses.english: The terrace is accessible with a museum ticket.
responses.phonetic: lah teh-RASS eh tahk-seh-SEE-bluh ah-VEK uhn bee-YAY poor luh moo-ZAY
responses.french: La terrasse est accessible avec un billet pour le musée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much a ticket costs
phrases.cultural_note: The ticket includes access to all exhibitions and the rooftop terrace. Reduced rates exist for students and under-26 EU residents.

responses.english: It is fifteen euros for a full-price ticket.
responses.phonetic: seh kanz uh-ROH luh bee-YAY plahn tah-REEF
responses.french: C'est quinze euros le billet plein tarif.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Où est la billetterie, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah bee-yet-REE, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Buying tickets online in advance can save time during busy periods.

responses.english: The ticket office is inside, on the ground floor.
responses.phonetic: lah bee-yet-REE eh tah lan-tay-RYUHR, oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY
responses.french: La billetterie est à l'intérieur, au rez-de-chaussée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the escalators on the outside
phrases.text_local: On peut monter par les escalators extérieurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: ohn puh mohn-TAY par layz es-kah-lah-TOHR ex-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: The famous transparent escalator tubes on the façade give progressively better views of Paris as you ascend. They're part of the museum visit experience.

responses.english: Yes, the escalators are part of the visit. They are included.
responses.phonetic: wee, layz es-kah-lah-TOHR fohn par-TEE duh lah vee-ZEET. eel sohn tahn-KLOO
responses.french: Oui, les escalators font partie de la visite. Ils sont inclus.

phrases.text_local: La bibliothèque est ouverte à tous ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah bee-blee-oh-TEK eh oo-VEHRT ah TOOSS
phrases.cultural_note: The BPI (Bibliothèque publique d'information) is free and open to everyone — no card needed. It's separate from the museum and has its own entrance.

responses.english: Yes, the library is free and open to everyone, separate entrance.
responses.phonetic: wee, lah bee-blee-oh-TEK eh grah-TWEET ay oo-VEHRT ah tooss, an-TRAY say-pah-RAY
responses.french: Oui, la bibliothèque est gratuite et ouverte à tous, entrée séparée.
